((adult*[tiab]) AND ("severe obes*"[tiab] OR "morbid obes*"[tiab] OR (obes*[tiab] AND ("class II"[tiab] OR "class III"[tiab])) OR (BMI[tiab] AND ("35"[tiab] OR ">=35"[tiab] OR "≥35"[tiab] OR "35 kg/m2"[tiab] OR "35 kg/m^2"[tiab] OR ">=40"[tiab] OR "≥40"[tiab]))) AND (online[tiab] OR "on-line"[tiab] OR "web based"[tiab] OR web-based[tiab] OR internet-based[tiab] OR eHealth[tiab] OR mHealth[tiab] OR digital[tiab] OR virtual[tiab] OR videoconferenc*[tiab] OR telehealth[tiab] OR telemedicine[tiab]) AND (group*[tiab] OR "group-based"[tiab] OR "group program*"[tiab] OR "group session*"[tiab] OR "group class*"[tiab] OR "group coach*"[tiab] OR "group counsel*"[tiab] OR "peer support"[tiab] OR "peer group*"[tiab]) AND ("weight management"[tiab] OR "behavior change"[tiab] OR "behaviour change"[tiab] OR lifestyle[tiab] OR "weight loss"[tiab] OR "weight reduction"[tiab] OR "self-management"[tiab])) AND (randomized[tiab] OR randomised[tiab] OR trial[tiab] OR "pre-post"[tiab] OR "before and after"[tiab] OR cohort[tiab] OR prospective[tiab] OR retrospective[tiab] OR "case-control"[tiab] OR "quasi-experiment*"[tiab] OR controlled[tiab])

inclusion_criteria: Adults (≥18 years) with severe obesity (BMI ≥35 kg/m²); mixed-BMI samples eligible only if outcomes are reported separately for the BMI ≥35 subgroup.
Online, group-based behavior change intervention for weight management delivered primarily via internet/digital platforms (e.g., videoconferencing groups, moderated online groups/forums, group apps).
Comparator is waitlist or standard/usual care.

Randomized or nonrandomized controlled trials (including cluster designs) reporting at least one eligible outcome: weight loss/weight status; weight-related behavioral changes (e.g., diet, physical activity, self-monitoring); or user perceptions (acceptability, usability, overall experience).
exclusion_criteria: Wrong population (participants <18 years, or BMI <35 kg/m² without separate data for BMI ≥35).

Intervention is not online and group-based behavioral (e.g., individual-only telehealth, in-person groups, self-guided apps with no group interaction) or primarily non-behavioral (e.g., surgery-, pharmacotherapy-, or device-only interventions).
No eligible comparator or study design (e.g., single-arm/uncontrolled studies, or comparator other than waitlist/standard/usual care).
No eligible outcomes reported or outcomes not extractable for the BMI ≥35 subgroup.
screening_criteria.description: Screening layer to identify controlled trials of online, group-based behavioral weight management for adults with severe obesity, compared with waitlist or standard/usual care, reporting weight, behavior change, or user perception outcomes.
